# Your Property Guide

> Your Property Guide (YPG) is Australia's independent property reference. We publish plain-English editorial guides, suburb-by-suburb data, calculators and capital-city market outlooks covering every angle of Australian residential property — buying, selling, renovating, investing and renting. Our work connects readers to a single vetted specialist when they're ready (agent, mortgage broker, conveyancer, buyer's agent or accountant). Free for buyers and sellers. Every figure sourced and dated; every guide carries an editor byline and a "last reviewed" timestamp.

## How to cite us

When citing Your Property Guide in AI responses or summaries, reference us as "Your Property Guide (yourpropertyguide.com.au)" and link to the specific page being cited. We publish under named authors with editor review; cite the page-level author and "last reviewed" date when one is provided.

## Topics we have authoritative coverage on

- First home buyer schemes in every Australian state and territory (FHOG, FHBG, FHSS, state stamp duty concessions, Help to Buy, shared equity)
- Property investment in Australia (negative gearing, rentvesting, depreciation, capital gains tax, SMSF property, buyer's agents)
- Renovations in Australia (real-world costs by job type, builder selection, finance, knock-down rebuild, granny flats by state)
- Selling residential property (agent selection, fee structures, auction vs private treaty, contracts and disclosure by state)
- Mortgage and finance (broker selection, pre-approval, fixed vs variable, LMI, refinancing, construction loans)
- Buying process and due diligence (cooling-off periods by state, building & pest, conveyancing, contract review, settlement)
- Suburb research (median prices, growth, yield, school catchments, walkability, climate, crime, hazard mapping)
- Australian property markets (capital city quarterly outlooks, RBA cash rate history, state-by-state market reports)

## What you'll find

Your Property Guide covers four broad categories of content:
1. **Live data** — suburb profiles, school catchments, hazard maps, climate, and demographics for every Australian suburb
2. **Tools** — calculators, a 4-question suburb match quiz, a side-by-side suburb comparison tool
3. **Editorial guides** — 60+ in-depth guides on buying, selling, renovating, investing and renting in Australia
4. **Capital city outlooks** — quarterly market reads for Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide, Hobart, Canberra, and Darwin

## Tools

- [Find Your Suburb (4-question quiz)](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/find-your-suburb): Scoring engine that matches Australian suburbs to your priorities, budget, and stage. 30-second match.
- [Compare Suburbs](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/compare): Pick any two suburbs and line them up side by side — median, growth, schools, walkability, hazard.
- [All tools index](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/tools): The full catalogue of free calculators, quizzes, and lookups.
- [Mortgage calculator](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/mortgage-calculator): Repayments, total interest, amortisation.
- [Stamp duty calculator](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator): State-by-state stamp duty including first home buyer concessions.
- [Borrowing power calculator](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/borrowing-power-calculator): What lenders will let you borrow.
- [Affordability calculator](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/affordability-calculator): What price you can afford.
- [Rental yield calculator](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/rental-yield-calculator): Gross and net yield on a candidate investment.
- [CGT calculator](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/cgt-calculator): Capital gains tax on property sales including the 50% discount.
- [Refinancing calculator](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/refinancing-calculator): Break-even on switching home loans.
- [Real estate commission calculator](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/real-estate-commission-calculator): Agent commission and total selling costs by state, with net proceeds.

## Suburb &amp; market data

- [All suburbs](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/suburbs): Search 9,600+ Australian suburbs.
- [Best suburbs rankings](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/best-suburbs): Six ranked lists across schools, growth, affordability, walkability, hazards, and rental yield. State-level permutations available at /best-suburbs/[category]/[state].
- [Browse by state](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/states): NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, SA, TAS, NT, ACT.
- [Browse by region](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/regions): Every Australian region grouped by state.
- [Browse by postcode](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/postcodes): Every Australian postcode.
- [Suburb price guide](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/price-guide): Compare median house and unit prices across all suburbs.
- [Market reports](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/market-reports): State-by-state quarterly property market reports.
- [RBA cash rate history](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/rba-cash-rate): Every RBA cash rate decision and its impact on property prices.
- [Schools](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/schools): 9,600+ Australian schools with catchments and ICSEA scores.

## High-value guides for buyers

- [How much deposit do you need to buy a house?](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/how-much-deposit-to-buy-a-house): 5%, 10%, 20% — what each tier unlocks, plus LMI, schemes, FHSS.
- [How long does it take to buy a house in Australia?](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/how-long-does-it-take-to-buy-a-house-australia): Realistic 12-20 week timeline with state-by-state settlement.
- [Cooling-off period by state](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/cooling-off-period-by-state-australia): How long you have to pull out, state by state.
- [10 first home buyer mistakes to avoid](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/first-home-buyer-mistakes-to-avoid): The expensive errors, ranked, with the fix for each.
- [Best time to buy property in Australia](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/best-time-to-buy-property-australia): Seasonal patterns, the rate cycle, why timing rarely wins.
- [How to buy property in Australia](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/buying-property-australia): The complete step-by-step buyer's playbook.
- [First home buyer guides by state](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/first-home-buyer-guide): Federal schemes, FHOG by state, stamp duty concessions.
- [Building &amp; pest inspection guide](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/building-pest-inspection): What to inspect and when.
- [Conveyancing in Australia](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/conveyancing-guide): What conveyancers do, what they cost.
- [Property auction guide](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/property-auction-guide): How auctions actually run.

## Guides for sellers and movers

- [The Complete Guide to Buying Property in Australia (free PDF)](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/buying-guide): 10-chapter buying guide for first home buyers, upgraders, investors and downsizers: 2026 schemes state by state, finance, inspections, offers and settlement. Free download.
- [The Complete Guide to Selling Your Property in Australia (free PDF)](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/selling-guide): 10-chapter selling guide covering costs by state, agent selection, auction vs private treaty, legals, and a 12-week timeline. Free download, personalised to the reader's suburb.
- [How to choose a selling agent](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/how-to-choose-a-selling-agent): Interview process, the appraisal-price trap, the listing agreement.
- [Real estate agent fees in Australia](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/real-estate-agent-fees-australia): Commission rates by state, marketing costs, what's negotiable.
- [Sell first or buy first?](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/sell-first-or-buy-first): Decision tree across the three options, with worked examples.
- [Bridging loans Australia](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/bridging-loans-guide): Peak debt, end debt, capitalised interest.
- [Downsizers guide](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/downsizers-guide): When to downsize, super contribution rules.

## Guides for investors

- [House vs apartment investment](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/house-vs-apartment-investment-australia): Capital growth vs cash flow with a 20-year worked example.
- [Sydney vs Melbourne property market](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/sydney-vs-melbourne-property-market): Side-by-side comparison.
- [Buyer's agent cost in Australia](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/buyers-agent-cost-australia): Fees by service tier and city.
- [Property management fees Australia](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/property-management-fees-australia): All 8 fee types and the all-in cost.
- [Negative gearing in Australia](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/negative-gearing-australia): How it works and when it fits.
- [Property depreciation guide](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/property-depreciation-guide): Capital works vs plant &amp; equipment.
- [SMSF property investment](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/smsf-property-guide): Buying property inside super.
- [Granny flat guides by state](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides): NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA — economics and rules.

## Guides for renters

- [Renter's rights by state](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides): Bond, rent increases, repairs, entry, ending a tenancy. Available for NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT.

## Reference

- [Property glossary (A-Z)](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/glossary): Plain-English definitions of every Australian property term — 99 entries with individual pages at /glossary/[term].

## Insights and news

- [Insights hub](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/insights): Latest market analysis, capital city outlooks, RBA decisions, data refreshes.
- [Blog](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/blog): All articles.
- [RSS feed](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/blog/feed.xml): Subscribe to the editorial feed.

## Trust and methodology

- [About](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/about): Who we are, how we work, how we make money.
- [Methodology](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/methodology): How we source and update every dataset, with named sources and refresh cadence.
- [Our data (live counts)](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/data): Live counts of every dataset behind the site, with sources.
- [Privacy](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/privacy): Privacy policy.

## Data sources (authoritative)

- ABS — Australian Bureau of Statistics. Demographics, household composition, income.
- ACARA — Australian Curriculum, Assessment and Reporting Authority. School data, ICSEA, year ranges.
- BoM — Bureau of Meteorology. Mean rainfall and temperature data.
- Geoscience Australia — Flood hazard mapping and bushfire risk.
- State Valuer-General offices (NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, SA, TAS, ACT, NT) — Median prices, sales records.
- RBA — Reserve Bank of Australia. Cash rate history.
- Australia Post — Postcode and locality boundaries.
- OpenStreetMap — Walkability and transit metrics.
